result: The datasets have been cleaned and preprocessed according to the specified instructions. The process involved loading the tab-delimited files, harmonizing missing-value codes (e.g., mapping -94 to -8, and Nulls to -3), creating age-specific variables for geographical measures (regub15, regov15, regub16, regov16, regov_w8, regov_w9, and regint32), and applying consistent factor labels for the government office region variables. The final cleaned dataset was merged by NSID and saved to data/output/cleaned_data.csv.
